$comment: Source of truth for the apodictic:state_card block (Retcon Planning, F2 — the State Card promoted to a standalone, rolling, project-root artifact [Project]_State_Card_[runlabel].md, diff'd across revision rounds by validate.sh state-card-diff; the Pass-10-class rolling-structured-artifact pattern, modeled on timeline-diff). One block = one round's card. `round` is a monotonic revision-round integer. The three tracked lists — active_promises, unresolved_tensions, forbidden_contradictions — hold 'SE-NN: <text>' strings that share ONE kind-agnostic SE-NN id namespace, so the SAME element keeps its id when it changes kind across rounds (the cross-revision-traceability lesson: don't depend on prose matching). The subset schema checker (scripts/apodictic_artifacts.py) cannot express the per-element 'SE-NN:' prefix, so its format and the within-card id-uniqueness are enforced in code by scripts/state_card_diff.py (S1/S2), the same way the F1 score rubric lives in code. likely_next_pressures is ephemeral (no ids, not tracked across rounds). The card records STATE, never prose interventions (the Firewall). See docs/retcon-planning.md.
title: APODICTIC state card (apodictic.state_card.v1)
